name: Q1233321
abstract: Stu Williamson (May 14, 1933 – October 1, 1991) was an American jazz trumpeter and valve trombonist. Born in Brattleboro, Vermont, Williamson was the younger brother of jazz pianist Claude Williamson.

concerts.label: Stan Kenton: Innovations in Modern Music
Stan Kenton: Innovations in Modern Music

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Strazzeri
about_quotes.evidence: I played with Bud Shank or played with Frank Rosolino or Conte or Bill Perkins or even Stu Williamson
about_quotes.doc_title: Frank Strazzeri interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 14, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: Holman Bill
about_quotes.evidence: the personnel in the band other than Charlie Mariano: Stu Williamson... I wanted to bring to a small jazz band the idea of a longer work... Charlie Mariano... was in the band at that time.
about_quotes.doc_title: Holman Bill — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
